pi_items.source: Task description states 'Create a new flight plan with these waypoints in order: San Jose (KSJC) -> Sacramento (KSMF) -> Reno (KRNO)'. Web search verified KSJC=Norman Y. Mineta San Jose International Airport, KSMF=Sacramento International Airport, KRNO=Reno-Tahoe International Airport.
Task description states 'The final plan must be KRNO -> KSMF -> KSJC'. This is the correct reverse of the outbound route. Verification: reverse(["KSJC", "KSMF", "KRNO"]) = ["KRNO", "KSMF", "KSJC"] ✓

privileged_info_summary: The task uses three real, publicly accessible airport codes: KSJC (Norman Y. Mineta San Jose International Airport in San Jose, CA), KSMF (Sacramento International Airport in Sacramento, CA), and KRNO (Reno-Tahoe International Airport in Reno, NV). The outbound flight plan route is KSJC -> KSMF -> KRNO. The inbound (reversed) route is KRNO -> KSMF -> KSJC, which is the correct reverse of the outbound route.
